title: Thread Management
purpose: This is where threads and provider-specific backup files are stored. Locally installed provider folders (.claude, .gemini, etc.) are either symlinks pointing to a sub-folder within here or synced copies that need to be updated/resynced periodically. Sub-folders are created and maintained monthly as providers change over time.

contents.name: claude
contents.description: Anthropic Claude Code CLI local data — conversations, settings, commands, session history

contents.name: gemini
contents.description: Google Gemini CLI local data — conversations, extensions, settings

contents.name: ollama
contents.description: Ollama offline model data — conversation history, model manifests
